target.title: Avoid Codex fork overcount when parent logs are missing
target.body:
Fixes #1138.

This treats unresolved fork parent baselines as untrusted for Codex cost scanning. When the parent session log is missing, cumulative child `total_token_usage` snapshots are no longer counted as fresh usage. Incremental `last_token_usage` rows still count.

## Proof

I ran the real `codexbar cost` CLI/scanner path against a temporary redacted `CODEX_HOME`, not the unit-test harness. The fixture contains one forked child session whose `forked_from_id` points to a missing parent session. The child cumulative `total_token_usage` reaches 1,010,163 total tokens, then includes one incremental `last_token_usage` row of 23 total tokens.

Command shape, with paths redacted:

```sh
HOME=<tmp-home> CODEX_HOME=<tmp-codex> swift run CodexBarCLI cost --provider codex --format json --pretty --refresh --days 1
```

Before/after summary from the same fixture:

```text
fixture cumulative child total tokens: 1010163
main output summary: {"sessionTokens":1010163,"last30DaysTokens":1010163,"dailyTotalTokens":1010163,"inputTokens":1000140,"outputTokens":10023}
pr output summary: {"sessionTokens":23,"last30DaysTokens":23,"dailyTotalTokens":23,"inputTokens":20,"outputTokens":3}
```

Redacted after-fix JSON from the PR branch:

```json
[
  {
    "daily": [
      {
        "date": "2026-05-24",
        "inputTokens": 20,
        "modelBreakdowns": [
          {
            "cost": 7.385e-05,
            "modelName": "gpt-5.2-codex",
            "totalTokens": 23
          }
        ],
        "modelsUsed": [
          "gpt-5.2-codex"
        ],
        "outputTokens": 3,
        "totalCost": 7.385e-05,
        "totalTokens": 23
      }
    ],
    "historyDays": 1,
    "last30DaysCostUSD": 7.385e-05,
    "last30DaysTokens": 23,
    "provider": "codex",
    "sessionCostUSD": 7.385e-05,
    "sessionTokens": 23,
    "source": "local",
    "totals": {
      "inputTokens": 20,
      "outputTokens": 3,
      "totalCost": 7.385e-05,
      "totalTokens": 23
    }
  }
]
```

## Validation

- `swift test --filter CostUsageScannerBreakdownTests`
- `swift test --filter CostUsageFetcherTests`
- `make check`
target.author: jskoiz
